intro: Industrial control systems and manufacturing have been the primary targets in a wave of remote code execution attacks, with academia and healthcare also affected. Between April 12 and April 25, 2026, ZCyberNews covered 18 articles on the rce tag, documenting 7 high-severity and 11 critical-severity vulnerabilities. The most critical CVEs include CVE-2025-54987 (CVSS 9.8), CVE-2025-0520 (CVSS 9.4), CVE-2026-39987 (CVSS 9.3), CVE-2026-22898 (CVSS 8.8), and CVE-2026-4682 (CVSS 8.8). These exploits have posed significant risks to industrial and operational technology environments.
